# Repair Asap LLC — llms.txt
# https://asap.repair

## About

Repair Asap LLC is a licensed and insured handyman service based in New York City, serving all 5 boroughs: Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, Bronx, and Staten Island. Founded and operated by Nikita Lylov. Address: 99-60 64th Ave, Rego Park, NY 11374.

Phone: +1 (775) 310-7770
Email: info@asap.repair
Website: https://asap.repair

## Services

- Furniture Assembly — IKEA, Wayfair, West Elm, and all brands. From $100/item.
- TV & Wall Mounting — All wall types including plaster, brick, concrete. From $125.
- Appliance Services — Dishwasher, washer/dryer, refrigerator, microwave installation.
- Flooring Installation — Laminate, vinyl, click-lock, peel & stick.
- Painting & Wall Finishes — Interior rooms, accent walls, drywall repair.
- AC Installation & Cleaning — Window units, portable, PTAC, through-wall.
- Plumbing — Faucet, toilet, garbage disposal, leak repair.
- Electrical — Light fixtures, ceiling fans, outlets, smart devices.
- General Repairs — Doors, locks, blinds, drywall patching, caulking.

## Pricing

- Minimum service call: $99
- Furniture assembly (single item): $100–$250
- TV mounting (up to 65"): $125–$175
- TV mounting (75"+): $150–$250
- Window AC installation: $150–$250
- Interior painting (per room): $350–$700+
- Faucet replacement: $150–$250

## Key Differentiators

- Licensed and fully insured (general liability)
- Provides Certificate of Insurance (COI) for NYC co-ops and condos
- Flat-rate pricing (no surprise hourly billing)
- Same-day and next-day appointments available
- 1-year labor warranty on all work
- Serves all 5 NYC boroughs

## Service Areas

Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens (Forest Hills, Rego Park, Astoria, Long Island City, Flushing, Bayside, Jackson Heights, Elmhurst, Jamaica, Woodside, Sunnyside, Howard Beach), Bronx, Staten Island, Western Long Island.

- How to Mount a TV in an NYC Apartment: https://asap.repair/blog/tv-mounting-nyc-apartment/
- Best Handyman Services in Queens, NYC: https://asap.repair/blog/handyman-queens-nyc/

## Booking

Book online via the quote form at https://asap.repair or call/text +1 (775) 310-7770.

## Hours

Monday–Friday: 9 AM – 7 PM
Saturday–Sunday: 10 AM – 4 PM
